query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM registrations WHERE meetupId = 510001) as total_registrations,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM registrations WHERE meetupId = 510001 AND teamName = 'A팀 아시아나항공') as a_team,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM registrations WHERE meetupId = 510001 AND teamName = 'B팀 대한항공') as b_team,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM flight_schedules WHERE meetupId = 510001) as total_flights,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM itineraries WHERE registrationId IN (SELECT id FROM registrations WHERE meetupId = 510001)) as total_itineraries;

  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM registrations WHERE meetupId = 510001 AND teamName = 'B팀 대한항공') as b_team,
